bead.title: feat(ui): add tenant/database picker dropdown in top nav or breadcrumb
bead.description:
Currently there is no way to switch tenants or databases without navigating back to /ui/tenants. Users expect a dropdown or picker in the nav bar or breadcrumb that lets them switch context without losing their place.

Requirements:
- Dropdown in the top nav or breadcrumb showing current tenant + database
- Clicking shows list of tenants (fetched from /control/tenants)
- Selecting a tenant shows its databases
- Selecting a database navigates to /ui/tenants/{t}/databases/{d}/collections
- Current tenant/database is visually highlighted
- Works from any page depth (collections, entities, schemas, audit)

Reference: the user reported that selecting tenant 'neixq' doesn't change the collections list — because there's no picker, only URL-based navigation.
